Blockers to discuss: Authentication setup failed.

layer1Verdict.headline: Do not ship this build.

narrative.layer2Story: TryLapse sent 3 AI personas through 5 product journeys and scored **0/6** steps as passing. No journeys broke outright, but 5 — Deep link to primary surface, Browse primary data view — had significant friction that could drive users to abandon.
